hero.question: Will Arizona win the 2026 NCAA Tournament?
hero.prob_take: At 29.1%, the crowd is pricing Arizona as a top-8 tournament contender, which feels about right for a blue-blood program in a loaded Pac-12 with inconsistent guard play. The real money here is watching whether they can land a lottery wing in the portal this offseason, because their ceiling moves 10+ points if they add legitimate scoring depth.

daily_take.headline: Arizona's Tournament Odds Just Spiked. Here's What Smart Money Sees.
daily_take.deck: Arizona jumped 2.2 points to 29.1% on 1.1M in volume, signaling real conviction from sharp bettors. The market is pricing in a program with lottery talent and a historic coach, yet still leaving value on the table. Elite programs with this pedigree rarely sit this cheap in March.
